error_chain: Ansible lookup('file') plugin reads binary file content from disk
Ansible Templar class receives template string with embedded binary lookup result
Ansible passes the full template expression to Jinja2 Environment.parse()
Jinja2 lexer tokenizes the template and encounters non-UTF-8 bytes
Jinja2 raises TemplateSyntaxError for unexpected character
Ansible catches and wraps the error with template context information
trigger_conditions: Ansible lookup plugin returns binary (non-UTF-8) content that gets embedded in template string before Jinja2 processing
Jinja2 lexer validates all characters in template source before filter evaluation occurs
The b64encode filter would handle binary data correctly but is never reached because lexer fails first
